title: Bump to v4.0.0 final
body: As the title says. Final backports, release notes updates, and the version bump.

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v4.0/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

I suspect it has to do with the wrapper to support v3.x with 4.x libpod.  My brain is too fried however.  I've pinged @jwhonce @flouthoc and @Luap99 to PTAL

https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/8a7e70919f4bab0757523ae97c170396cb13c83d#diff-044d310f157316ea3de231effda8f6822c587dd263482131fc09b6a2c12b0ddaR167
Looks like tests are going to pass
